message.content:
@startuml
title Memverifikasi SPT BKA

actor "AdministratorTU" as AdministratorTU
interface "Dashboard_V" as Dashboard_V
interface "KontrolSPTBKA_V" as KontrolSPTBKA_V
boundary "Admin_C" as Admin_C
boundary "KontroSPT_C" as KontroSPT_C
entity "SuratPerintahTugas_E" as SuratPerintahTugas_E

AdministratorTU -> Dashboard_V : 1 load->view()
Dashboard_V --> AdministratorTU : 2 Halaman Dashboard
AdministratorTU -> Dashboard_V : 3 klik menu SPT BKA
Dashboard_V -> KontroSPT_C : 4 kontrolsptbka()
KontroSPT_C --> SuratPerintahTugas_E : 5
SuratPerintahTugas_E --> KontroSPT_C : 6
KontroSPT_C -> KontrolSPTBKA_V : 7 load->view()
KontrolSPTBKA_V --> AdministratorTU : 8 Halaman SPT BKA
AdministratorTU -> KontrolSPTBKA_V : 9 klik tombol Accept SPT BKA
KontrolSPTBKA_V -> KontroSPT_C : 10 acceptsptbkalengkap()
KontroSPT_C --> SuratPerintahTugas_E : 11
SuratPerintahTugas_E --> KontroSPT_C : 12
KontroSPT_C -> KontrolSPTBKA_V : 13 load->view()
KontrolSPTBKA_V --> AdministratorTU : 14 Halaman SPT BKA

@enduml
